channel.title: version on ilo
channel.description: Recent content in version on ilo

item.title: Version
item.description: In order to see the version of ilo itself, run ilo --version or ilo -V. Its output looks something like this: $ ilo --version ilo: 0.0.0-SNAPSHOT JVM: 11.0.8 (Oracle Corporation Substrate VM GraalVM 20.2.0 Java 11) OS: Linux 5.7.17-200.fc32.x86_64 amd64
